name: Description
text:
Last week I visited the Doctor in that abandoned school building nearby. He told me that I should cut all my "bad habits", but the old fucker smokes himself, so screw him!

You're probably just one of those modern-day hippies who only licks mint pastilles when things get rough, but if you happen to find one of these, bring a pack or two and some matches as well.

name: Info
text:
A weight capacity value (kg) of how much inventory weight you can carry.

Carry Capacity increases when you equip items such as backpacks, rigs or clothing with a positive capacity stat.

Carry Capacity by default is 10kg

name: Info
text: A price value (€) of all equipment items.

name: Info
text:
A clothing-based thermal protection value against cold.

Insulation is linked to Body Temp vital, where Insulation reduces Body Temp decrease speed in Winter.

Insulation increases when you equip clothing items with a positive insulation stat.

Insulation examples:
[100] = B. Temp decrease fully stopped
[50] = B. Temp decrease slowed by 50%
[0] = B. Temp decreases at default rate

name: Info
text:
An inertia-based value of how quickly you can move and do certain actions.

Dexterity is linked to movement speed and weapon handling such as aiming and reloading.

Dexterity decreases when you equip heavy or unergonomic items with a negative dexterity stat.

name: Info
text:
An intimidation value of how threatening AI sees your character and equipment.

When you have a high Menace value, AI is less likely to use aggressive or attack-based behaviors against you.

Menace increases when you equip items such as special clothing with a positive Menace stat.

Menace only affects low-tier AI (Bandits).

name: Info
text:
A protection value against chemical, biological, radiological and nuclear threats.

CBRN is linked to Health vital, where CBRN reduces the Health decrease speed when you are exposed to hazardous areas or materials.

CBRN increases when you equip items such as special clothing or protective masks with a positive CBRN stat.

name: Info
text:
Your main vital for staying alive.

Health decreases with damages and active medical conditions.

Health increases with certain medical items such as Bandages and Medkits.

Health [0] -> Character dies

name: Info
text:
Your hunger and energy level.

Energy decreases over time and using map transitions with Energy Cost.

Energy increases with certain consumables such as food.

Energy [0] -> Starvation (Condition)

name: Info
text:
Your thirst and hydration level.

Hydration decreases over time and using map transitions with Hydration Cost. 

Certain dry or salty consumables may also decrease Hydration.

Hydration increases with certain consumables such as drinks.

Hydration [0] -> Dehydration (Condition)

name: Info
text:
Your happiness and sanity level.

Mental decreases over time and with nasty consumables. Any active medical condition makes the decrease speed 2x.

Mental increases with comforting items such as snacks, warm meals and vices like alcohol or nicotine products.

Mental [0] -> Insanity (Condition)

name: Info
text:
Your warmth and body temperature level.

Body Temp decreases over time in Winter. Decrease speed can be reduced by staying indoors or by equipping clothing items with a positive insulation stat.

Body Temp increases in Shelter or by staying around heat sources like fires. Certain heat-related items such as Heatpacks or Space Blankets will also increase Body Temp.

Body Temp [0] -> Frostbite (Condition)

name: Info
text:
Grandma's cat health level.

Cat health activates if you decide to rescue the Cat and bring her to your shelter.

Cat health decreases over time.

Cat health increases when you feed the cat with consumables such as Cat Food or Canned Tuna.

Cat [0] -> Cat dies

name: Info
text:
A condition where you are carrying too much weight and movement becomes unsustainable.

Causes:
- Inventory Weight > Carry Capacity

Symptoms
- All stamina consumption [+50%]
- All stamina regeneration [Blocked]
- Movement speed [-50%]
- Jump height [-50%]

Cures:
- Inventory Weight < Carry Capacity

name: Info
text:
A condition where you have a lack of calories and essential nutrients.

Causes:
- Energy [0]

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 10 sec]
- Stamina consumption [+50%]
- Stamina regeneration [-50%]

Cures:
- Consumables

name: Info
text:
A condition where your body doesn't have enough fluids to function normally.

Causes:
- Hydration [0]

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 10 sec]
- All stamina consumption [+50%]
- All stamina regeneration [-50%]

Cures:
- Consumables

name: Info
text:
A condion where you have a minor bleeding from small cuts or scrapes.

Causes: 
- Weapon damage
- Explosion damage
- Fall damage
- Razor wire

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 5 sec]

Cures: 
- Bandage
- Tourniquet
- Medkit
- IFAK / AFAK

name: Info
text:
A condition where you have a partial or complete break in the bone.

Causes: 
- Weapon damage
- Explosion damage
- Fall damage

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 5 sec]
- Movement speed [-50%]
- Jump height [-50%]

Cures: 
- Splint
- Medkit
- IFAK / AFAK

name: Info
text:
A condition where you have a tissue damage from intense heat or high-voltage electric current.

Causes:
- Fire damage
- Electrical damage

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 5 sec]

Cures:
- Balm
- Lotion
- Medkit
- IFAK / AFAK

name: Info
text:
A condition where you have hypothermia or body part freezes from cold exposure.

Causes: 
- Body temperature [0]

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 5 sec]

Cures:
- Fire sources
- Sleeping Bag
- Thermal Blanket

name: Info
text:
A condition where your sanity breaks and you start having dark thoughts.

Causes: 
- Mental [0]

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 10 sec]

Cures:
- Consumables
- Sleeping
- Fire sources
- Instruments

name: Info
text:
A condition where toxic substance entered your digestion or lungs.

Causes:
- Chemical damage
- Toxic consumables

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 2 sec]

Cures:
- Medkit
- AFAK

name: Info
text:
A critical condition where you have a catastrofal bleeding or major internal wound.

Causes: 
- Weapon damage
- Explosion damage

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 1 sec]

Cures:
- Medkit
- IFAK / AFAK

name: Info
text:
A critical condition where you have a major head related wound.

Causes: 
- Weapon damage

Symptoms:
- Health [-1 unit / 1 sec]

Cures:
- Medkit
- IFAK / AFAK

name: Info
text:
Number of Days survived.

New day begins at 00:00 midnight and certain amount of days will unlock new game events.

Upcoming events can be displayed by using the Events tool.

name: Info
text:
Number of Shelters unlocked.

Shelters are safe zones for saving your progression and loot. Game world has multiple shelters and these vary in terms of theme, size and customizability.

New game starts with two unlocked Shelters called Cabin and Tent.

Additional Shelters can be unlocked with keys which you acquire by completing Tasks from different Traders.

name: Info
text:
Number of Tasks completed.

Tasks are item-based jobs from Traders. Tasks can be interconnected between multiple Traders and might also require non-lootable items with crafting.

Tasks are linked to cheaper trading prices (Trader Tax) and acquiring keys to unlock new Shelters and special rooms.

name: Info
text:
Number of Quests completed.

Quests are lore-based missions from Traders. Quests can be interconnected between multiple Traders and might require certain events before becoming available.

name: Info
text:
Number of CDS completed.

Civil Defence Shelters (CDS) are concrete bunkers and underground areas designed to offer protection against military threats.

After the Area 05 evacuation, these CDS's were overrun and most of the survival gear inside them were stolen.

You can complete a CDS by clearing out the hostile enemies and connecting the CDS emergency broadcasting radio back on.

name: Info
text:
There will be a silent night when all fades away.

When you look up, you see the North Star, your only light in the darkness.

This light reminds you of home, a place where you came from and where you will return.

You feel safe, a peaceful moment that feels like the ending you wanted.

Then your last light disappears, the sky turns red and the silence breaks.

name: Info
text:
A friendly NPC with trading supply, tasks and specialized services.

Name: Commonly known name among locals.
Tax: Price multiplier for supply items.
Tasks: Number of completed tasks.
Resupply: Time when supply resets.

name: Info
text:
A deal balance meter which compares selected item values.

Requsted Value (€) is calculated from selected Supply items with Tax added.

Offer Value (€) is calculated from selected Inventory items.

Deal can be accepted when Deal Meter is within green area which means Offer Value matches or proceeds Request Value + Tax.
